_comment: Remote GPU host config for /execute (D-002: the harness owns scpâ†’launchâ†’pollâ†’fetch). Copy to experiments/<exp>/host-config.json (GITIGNORE IT) and fill in. NEVER put a key, token, or password in this file â€” reference an environment variable name and let the run inherit it. The secret-scan in /data-audit will flag inline credentials.

auth._note: Resolve the key path from $PROTEUS_SSH_KEY_PATH at runtime; do not inline the key.

remote._note: Credentials needed remotely are passed by NAME via env_passthrough, never written here.

launch._sandbox_note: Open question (deferred): container/sandbox for agent-written code. 'none' trusts the manual RunPod flow; set to a container command to harden.

poll._note: Stay under the cache TTL when polling; /execute backs off to longer intervals for long runs.

fetch._note: Only reduced artifacts are fetched into the repo; the 7.4 TB raw tensors stay remote (two-tier data access).
